events.title: Launch
events.description: SLS Block 1 lifts Artemis II toward parking orbit.

events.title: Trans-lunar injection
events.description: Upper stage performs the translunar injection burn.

events.title: Blue marble window
events.description: Iconic Earth receding view from Orion.

events.title: Closest lunar approach
events.description: Orion sweeps behind the Moon on a crewed lunar flyby.

events.title: Story beat: far side blackout
events.description: Mission control temporarily loses direct line of sight as Orion passes behind the Moon.

events.title: Return arc established
events.description: Free-return arc commits the crew to Earth return.
